reason: Bitcoin is exhibiting strong upward momentum, acting as a safe-haven asset amidst global commodity spikes and traditional equity market declines, evidenced by significant volume surges on exchanges and notable institutional interest. However, regulatory ambiguities, particularly regarding the 'Clarity Act' potentially favoring banks, and the moderation of the primary macro catalyst (oil price spike) due to G7 intervention, introduce substantial volatility and risk. Investors should closely monitor for potential pullbacks or consolidation in light of these conflicting signals.
headlines: Bitcoin rises as oil spikes, equities drop
Nigel Farage takes 6% stake in UK bitcoin treasury firm Stack BTC
Clarity Act will benefit banks more than crypto, former CFTC chair says
Bitflyer volume surges 200% past Binance, Coinbase as oil spike sends Nikkei sliding
Oil pulls back from 25% spike as G7 discusses emergency reserve release
